meta.note: Bay Area seed compiled from public sources. Every record is flagged needs_verification: addresses, hours, and phone numbers MUST be confirmed with each provider before anyone relies on them. Coordinates are approximate.

services.name: St. Anthony's Dining Room
services.description: Free hot meals served daily, no questions asked.
services.address: 121 Golden Gate Ave, San Francisco, CA 94102

services.name: GLIDE Daily Free Meals
services.description: Three free meals a day, 364 days a year. No ID, no cost, no questions.

services.name: LavaMaeˣ Mobile Showers
services.description: Free mobile showers and hygiene services. Schedule and locations vary by day.

services.name: Tenderloin Technology Lab
services.description: Free computer access and digital literacy education.
services.address: 121 Golden Gate Ave, San Francisco, CA 94102

services.name: Hospitality House Shelter
services.description: Free emergency shelter and drop-in services for adults experiencing homelessness.

services.name: Homeless Advocacy Project
services.description: Free legal advice, advocacy, and services information for people who are homeless or low-income.

services.name: HealthRIGHT 360 Clinic
services.description: Free and low-cost integrated medical, dental, and behavioral health care. Sliding scale.

services.name: St. Vincent de Paul Free Dining Room
services.description: Free hot dining room for people who are homeless or low-income.

services.name: Alameda County Community Food Bank
services.description: Regional food bank; call the helpline to be connected to a nearby pantry or hot meal the same day.

services.name: CityTeam Oakland
services.description: Hot breakfast and dinner, clothing, and shelter services.

services.name: Dorothy Day House Drop-in Center
services.description: Daily drop-in: meals, showers, laundry, clothing, lockers, mail, internet, housing support. Open 365 days.

services.name: Women's Daytime Drop-in Center
services.description: Daytime drop-in and housing resources for women and families; food and hygiene services.

services.name: Berkeley Food & Housing Project
services.description: Emergency shelter, meals, and housing services. Call the shelter hotline for reservations.

services.name: Sacred Heart Community Service
services.description: Food pantry, clothes closet, and housing/benefits assistance. Must reside in Santa Clara County.

services.name: CityTeam San Jose
services.description: Daily hot meals, mobile food pantries, showers, clothing, and transitional housing.
services.address: 1174 Old Bayshore Hwy, San Jose, CA 95112
services.hours: Hot meals daily, call to confirm

services.name: LifeMoves Georgia Travis Center
services.description: Shelter and services for women and children experiencing homelessness.

services.name: Samaritan House
services.description: Free medical and dental clinics, food, shelter, and case management for San Mateo County.

services.name: LifeMoves Maple Street Shelter
services.description: Emergency shelter and supportive services for families and adults.

services.name: St. Vincent de Paul Free Dining Room (Marin)
services.description: Marin's primary free meals program. Open every day of the year; 500+ meals daily.

services.name: St. Vincent de Paul Housing Help Desk
services.description: Housing assessment, temporary shelter placement, and homelessness prevention. Located above the Free Dining Room.

services.name: Ritter Center
services.description: Marin's primary healthcare provider for people experiencing homelessness: medical, behavioral health, showers, food pantry.
services.verification_note: Ritter announced a move to 800 A St from 16 Ritter St -- confirm current location.

services.name: Homeward Bound of Marin - New Beginnings Center
services.description: Emergency shelter and services for adults, with job training via Fresh Starts Culinary Academy. In Novato.

services.name: Homeward Bound of Marin - Family Center
services.description: Emergency and transitional housing for families with children in Marin.
